strategic_alignment.assessment: Has clear vision, positioning, and 5 pillars established
strategic_alignment.evidence: Vision & Goals document, Strategic positioning defined, Competitive advantages articulated

partnership_governance.assessment: 10 comprehensive policies covering all partnership aspects
partnership_governance.evidence: Core governance policy, escalation models, conflict resolution procedures defined

nda_confidentiality.assessment: Digital NDA template with automated enforcement
nda_confidentiality.evidence: 6 automation features, blockchain audit trails, geofencing controls, digital watermarking

information_security.evidence: Encryption standards, access controls, monitoring, incident response defined

islamic_compliance.assessment: All agreements reviewed and approved by Sharia Board
islamic_compliance.evidence: No Riba, Mudharabah/Musharaka models, Zakat automation, Sharia council oversight

technical_integration.assessment: 4 integration patterns (API, Event-driven, File, DB Replication)
technical_integration.evidence: API governance defined, data governance rules, integration SLA targets

operational_readiness.assessment: Governance council structure, reporting, KPI monitoring defined
operational_readiness.evidence: Quarterly reviews, monthly reports, SLA enforcement, escalation procedures

automation_maturity.evidence: Smart contracts, KPI dashboards, compliance scanning, revenue reconciliation, Zakat automation

overall_score.assessment: PARTNERSHIP FRAMEWORK COMPLETE & READY FOR ACTIVATION
overall_score.recommendation: Proceed with Tier 1 partner recruitment and onboarding

identified_risks: Partner onboarding complexity (can be mitigated with dedicated Partner Manager)
Data residency compliance (managed by geofencing & automated compliance scanning)
Dispute escalation management (Islamic mediation first, then arbitration)
mitigation_strategies: Establish dedicated Partnership Office with 3-5 staff
Maintain relationships with Islamic arbitrators & mediators in Saudi Arabia & GCC
